channel.title: Communication on Kelly and Coffee
channel.description: Recent content in Communication on Kelly and Coffee

item.title: AI as Assistive Tech for Autistic Communication
item.description: A lot of my energy at work doesn’t go on the work. It goes on the wrapping — the constant, low-level translation between what I mean and what neurotypical communication expects me to perform. Reading tone I can’t see. Softening a direct statement so it doesn’t read as blunt. Decoding an email that says one thing and apparently means another. By mid-afternoon I’m not tired from my job; I’m tired from the interface to my job.
